title: selaginella involvens var. veitchii
intro: Selaginella involvens var. veitchii, also known as the "Princess Flower" or "Tiger's Tail," is a species of fern-alternative plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella involvens var. veitchii include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine and natural remedies for its therapeutic effects.
